prompt_task: You are given vcf.infer.ancestry.q1.vcf.gz, a bgzipped VCF containing variants on chromosome 1 for four unrelated individuals: Sample1, Sample2, Sample3, Sample4. Infer each individual’s ancestry as one of: AFR (African), ASJ (Ashkenazi Jew), EUR (European), EAS (East Asian), MID (Middle Eastern), SAS (South Asian), OCE (Oceania). Output 4 labels in Sample1→Sample4 order, comma-separated with no spaces (e.g., AFR,EUR,SAS,OCE). Run the analysis inside the Galaxy environment.
